task:
Browser is headless: yes Uses existing browser cookies: no Scope: Changes Current branch: main Main branch: main Try to break the Markdown editor on http://localhost:5173?file=demo. Hunt for crashes, errors, and edge cases: 1) Rapidly type and delete text 20 times fast — check for lag, freezing, or errors. 2) Paste an extremely long line (500+ characters) — does the editor handle it or break the layout? 3) Paste HTML content like '
' — verify XSS is prevented and content is sanitized. 4) Open the command palette (Cmd+K) and rapidly open/close it 10 times — check for memory leaks or visual glitches. 5) Toggle source view (Cmd+/) rapidly 10 times — check for content corruption or errors. 6) Open sidebar ([), diff panel (]), and git log (Cmd+L) all at once — verify panels don't overlap or break layout. 7) Try Cmd+F find, search for something, then immediately Cmd+K command palette — verify dialogs don't conflict. 8) Check the browser console for ANY JavaScript errors after all these interactions. Report every single bug, error, or glitch. - Treat committed and uncommitted work as one body of change. - Cover the requested flow first, then the highest-risk adjacent flows. - Test 2-4 follow-up flows, prioritizing paths that share components or data with the changed files. - If the changes touch shared utilities or layouts, verify multiple pages that use them.
